description: Upload anonymized source documents to the 'Central Review Uploads' CRF for subjects DM-101 and DM-102 in the 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' study. Login to OpenClinica using username 'root' and password 'Admin123!'. For subject DM-101, upload /home/ga/source_docs/DM-101_ECG.pdf to the 'Baseline Assessment' event with the document type 'ECG' and comment 'Baseline ECG'. For subject DM-102, upload /home/ga/source_docs/DM-102_LabReport.pdf to the 'Baseline Assessment' event with the document type 'Lab Report' and comment 'Screening Labs'. Mark both CRFs as complete.
